decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_mta-nyct already exists in the registry with matching payload (entity_name 'MTA New York City Transit', entity_type 'agency', acronym 'NYCT'). Since the closest matching registry record is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new — the observation already resolves to that canonical record and no different target is needed.
